words.def: the income or profit arising from such transactions as the sale of land or other property
words.zh: vt. 取走, 預備動作（take第三人稱單數）

words.def: (law) a right or legal share of something; a financial involvement with something
words.zh: n. 樁, 炮烙刑, 木柱, 賭注, 獎金

words.def: the income or profit arising from such transactions as the sale of land or other property
words.zh: vt. 拿, 取, 抓, 帶領, 獲得, 就座, 接受, 吃, 吸引, 採取, 乘, 需要, 花費

words.def: a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used
words.zh: n. 日落, 同夥, 組合, 集合, 裝置
